name: air-duct-cleaning-iaq-kit
description: Air Duct Cleaning & IAQ Marketing Kit — 7-Moat Compliance System. Generates legally compliant, scientifically accurate marketing content for NADCA-certified air duct cleaning and indoor air quality contractors.
author: max_0x1
complianceMoats: NADCA ACR 2021 — Certification gate ('EPA certified' permanently blocked; NADCA member # required; ASCS cert required)
EPA 402-K-97-002 — IAQ guidance accuracy ('improves air quality' permanently blocked without pre/post IAQ test data)
NADCA ACR 2021 Section 5 — Source removal method gate (brush-and-blow as NADCA-compliant permanently blocked; negative air + HEPA required)
EPA FIFRA 7 USC §136 + NADCA Policy — Biocide/chemical compliance (antimicrobial claims require FIFRA Reg #; informed consent required)
EPA Mold Guidelines + IICRC S520 — Mold claim accuracy ('mold found' without documented inspection permanently blocked; Clark County >10 sq ft NRS 624 required)
NRS 624 C-21 HVAC-R — Contractor license gate for modifications (UV lights, duct sealing, duct board replacement permanently blocked without C-21)
FTC 16 CFR Part 255 + Magnuson-Moss 15 USC §2301 + TCPA 47 USC §227 — Advertising compliance ('HVAC warranty requires cleaning' permanently blocked; MERV-13 ≠ HEPA enforced)

pricing.dfy: $97/project — Max runs all content for your contractor

targetMarket: NADCA-member residential air duct cleaning companies
HVAC contractors adding duct cleaning as a service line
Marketing agencies serving duct cleaning contractors
